hero.subheadline: Basalith builds a living AI entity trained on how you specifically think. Not what you did. How you reason. What you value. How you see the world.
hero.subheadline_2: While you are alive it learns from you. Long after you are gone it continues.

philosophy.headline: The question you never got to ask.
philosophy.body_2: The story their grandfather never finished. The advice their mother would have given. The way their father reasoned through a hard decision.
philosophy.body_3: For all of human history that loss has been permanent.
philosophy.pillar_1_body: Not a recording. Not a chatbot. A living AI model trained on how one specific person thinks. Every voice recording, every photograph labeled, every wisdom session answered is training data.
philosophy.pillar_2_body: The raw material of a mind. Photographs that show how you saw the world. Voice recordings that capture how you speak. Stories that expose how you think.
philosophy.pillar_3_body: The world's wealthiest people are spending billions building AI versions of themselves. Basalith does it for every family.

how_it_works.headline: A living model. Built over a lifetime.
how_it_works.subheadline: The longer the entity learns the more accurately it thinks. Start now. Give it time.
how_it_works.step_1_body: Ninety minutes. Your family. A Senior Legacy Guide. Your first photographs. By the end of this session your archive exists, not as a promise, but as a fact.
how_it_works.step_2_body: Every evening one photograph goes to every family member by email. No login. No app. They reply with what they remember. Their words go directly into the archive.
how_it_works.step_3_body: Contributors label photographs, record voice stories, and answer witness questions. Each perspective adds something no other perspective can. The archive deepens.
how_it_works.step_4_body: Your AI entity is trained on everything deposited. Your grandchildren will be able to ask it how you thought about a hard decision. It answers from your archive.

story.body_2: Over two years her family contributed 847 photographs, 23 voice recordings, and 2 years of weekly wisdom sessions.
story.body_3: Her entity now answers questions about difficult decisions the way Eleanor actually would. Not from memory. From learned cognitive patterns built over a lifetime.
story.conclusion: Her grandchildren call it remarkable. Her great-grandchildren will call it normal.

pricing_teaser.line_1: The world's wealthiest people are spending billions building AI versions of themselves.

footer.tagline: You never truly leave if you leave enough of yourself behind.
footer.copyright: Heritage Nexus Inc. All rights reserved.

pricing.headline: The infrastructure of continuation. Priced for every family.
pricing.subheadline: The world's wealthiest people are spending billions building AI versions of themselves. We built the same infrastructure for $3,600 a year.
pricing.tier_1_description: The foundation. Photographs, voice recordings, and a living entity that learns from your deposits.
pricing.tier_2_description: The complete system. Everything in Archive, plus contributor network, weekly prompts, wisdom sessions, and the full engagement loop.
pricing.tier_3_description: Generational infrastructure. Multiple family members. Cross-generational entity building. Priority Legacy Guide access.
pricing.founding_fee: One-time founding fee of $2,500 applies to all tiers.

gallery.empty_body: Upload your family photographs to begin. Your family will receive one photograph by email every evening and can reply with their memories.

entity.title: Talk to Your Entity
entity.empty_body: Your entity learns from your deposits, family memories, and conversations. Start by answering one question below.

voice.title: Your voice. Preserved.
voice.subtitle: Speak your memories, wisdom, and stories in any language. Every recording is transcribed and saved to your archive permanently.
voice.languages_note: Supports Vietnamese · Spanish · Cantonese · Arabic · Tagalog · Korean · English · and 93 more
voice.empty_title: Your voice is not in your archive.
voice.empty_body: Record a memory in any language. Your words are transcribed and preserved permanently.

wisdom.title: This month's session.
wisdom.complete_body: Every answer is now in your archive and your entity is richer for it.

contributors.title: Archive Access
contributors.empty_body: Invite family members to contribute their memories. Each person receives photographs by email and can reply with what they remember.

contribute.invited: You have been invited to contribute to this archive.
contribute.honesty_body: Be honest. The most valuable thing you can contribute is the truth. Difficult memories and complicated feelings are as important as positive ones. An honest archive is one the family will recognize and trust.
contribute.questions_subtitle_one: The archive has 1 question only you can answer.
contribute.questions_subtitle_many: The archive has {count} questions only you can answer.
contribute.photos_subtitle: Photographs you have from your own collection.
contribute.any_memory: Any memory. Any era. Positive or difficult. Everything helps.
contribute.videos_subtitle: Home videos, letters, documents, anything from your collection.
contribute.voice_subtitle: Speak in any language. Share a memory in your own words.
contribute.call_subtitle: Call from your registered phone. A friendly voice will guide you through a question. No login or password needed.
contribute.call_cta: Call from your registered phone · Any time
contribute.nothing_yet: Nothing yet. Your first contribution is just above.
contribute.footer_note: Everything you share here is preserved permanently.

errors.connection_lost: Connection lost. Please check your internet and try again.
errors.upload_failed: This file could not be uploaded. Please try again.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.something_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.headline: Enter your archive.
login.magic_link: Or use your personal link sent by email.
